Rulings.Edison:
The ①:
●This trigger effect activates at the end of the Damage Step, when the monster is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY.
●If your "Giant Rat" is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY, this card's effect activates on the same chain. You can order the chain links in any way you like, but must declare them at the same time (before your opponent responds with a Fast Effect or their own Trigger Effect).
●This effect cannot miss the timing.
●Because Tokens cannot be sent to the GY, you cannot activate this effect when a Token is destroyed by battle, nor if a token you control was destroyed this turn.

The ②:
●This is a trigger effect which activates when this card is summoned. This effect cannot miss the timing.
●You may choose an attribute that is not on the field.
●Since this effect may not destroy any monsters, "Stardust Dragon"'s effect cannot be activated in response.
●If you choose LIGHT, Tualatin will destroy itself.

The ③:
●This continuous effect applies for as long as Tualatin is face-up on the field.
●If Tualatin is flipped face-down and then face-up, this effect no longer applies.

PSCT.Edison:
① At the end of the Damage Step during your opponent's Battle Phase, if a monster you controlled at the start of this Battle Phase was destroyed, and all monsters you controlled at the start of this Battle Phase (min. 2) have now been destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. 
② If you do: Choose an Attribute and destroy all face-up monsters with that Attribute. 
③ Your opponent cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters with the chosen Attribute.

PSCT.Base: If it is your opponent's Battle Phase, a monster you controlled at the start of this Battle Phase was just destroyed, and all monsters you controlled at the start of this Battle Phase (min. 2) have now been destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way: Choose an Attribute, and if you do, destroy all face-up monsters with that Attribute. Your opponent cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters with that Attribute.
